rules.rule_text: Haredi boys elementary: settlement-type dependent. B: 112 m²/class, 0.2 dunam/class. C: 125 m²/class, 0.25 dunam/class. 20 students/class.
rules.notes: Activated only when haredi_pct > 0. Weighted land: 18% kindergarten-rate (0.375 dunam) + 82% class-rate (B:0.2 / C:0.25). 20 students per class.

rules.rule_text: Haredi boys secondary: B: 145 m²/class, 0.35 dunam/class. C: 160 m²/class, 0.3 dunam/class. 20 students/class.
rules.notes: Activated only when haredi_pct > 0. B: 145 m² + 0.35 dunam per class. C: 160 m² + 0.3 dunam per class.

rules.rule_text: Haredi girls elementary: B: 165 m²/class, 0.4 dunam/class. C: 185 m²/class, 0.3 dunam/class. 27 students/class.
rules.notes: Activated only when haredi_pct > 0. 27 students per class. B: 165 m² + 0.4 dunam. C: 185 m² + 0.3 dunam.

rules.rule_text: Haredi girls secondary: B: 205 m²/class, 0.5 dunam/class. C: 230 m²/class, 0.4 dunam/class. 27 students/class.
rules.notes: Activated only when haredi_pct > 0. 27 students per class. B: 205 m² + 0.5 dunam. C: 230 m² + 0.4 dunam.

rules.rule_text: Special education daycare: special_education_pct of cohort. 6 children/class. 187.5 m²/class. 0.375 dunam/class.
rules.notes: Activated when special_education_pct > 0. 750 m² for 4 classes. 1.5 dunam for 4 classes.

rules.rule_text: Special education kindergarten: special_education_pct of cohort. 6 children/class. 130 m²/class + 200 m² yard. 0.375 dunam/class.
rules.notes: Activated when special_education_pct > 0. 6 students/class. 130 m² built + 200 m² yard per class.

rules.rule_text: Special education primary: special_education_pct of age 6-12. 10 students/class. 193.5 m²/class. 0.3 dunam/class.
rules.notes: Activated when special_education_pct > 0. 10 students/class. 193.5 m² built. 0.3 dunam per class.

rules.rule_text: Special education secondary: special_education_pct of age 12-18. 10 students/class. 147 m²/class. 0.3 dunam/class.
rules.notes: Activated when special_education_pct > 0. 10 students/class. 147 m² built. 0.3 dunam per class.

rules.rule_text: Enrichment programs (gifted center, maritime school, Hila, youth employment, etc.) allocated as part of citywide basket. No direct formula — included in citywide allocation.
rules.notes: Included as part of citywide public-space allocation. Services include: Gifted center, maritime education school, Hila, Miftan, Matia, Psagot, agricultural farm. No standalone land quota.

rules.rule_text: Welfare basket allocation: 0.025 m²/person as part of citywide allocation. Includes day centers, clubs, sheltered workshops.
rules.notes: 0.05 m²/person included in citywide allocation. Services: early childhood center, adult day centers, autism centers, disabled clubs, sheltered workshops. No dedicated land plot.

rules.rule_text: 1 community center per ~5,000 regular users (20% participation). 5,000 m² built. 3 dunam land.
rules.notes: 20% regular users. 5,000 m² built per center. 3 dunam per center. Sports pool/hall area covered under sports rules.

rules.rule_text: Population × 0.49 × traditional_rate. 250 worshippers per synagogue. 1.1 m²/worshipper. 0.25 dunam per synagogue (50% allocation — rest combined in buildings).
rules.notes: 0.49 = male share of Jewish population. traditional_pct = rate of traditional/religious population. 1.1 m²/worshipper average. 0.25 dunam per synagogue — only 50% of demand gets dedicated plot; the rest combined in other buildings.

rules.rule_text: Population × traditional_rate × 0.07. 23 women per pool. 60 m²/pool. 0.125 dunam/pool.
rules.notes: 0.07 coefficient = proportion of women of childbearing age after excluding pregnancy/birth periods. 60 m²/pool (weighted average). 0.125 dunam per pool (0.5 dunam for 4 pools).

rules.rule_text: 1 stadium per 150,000 residents. 20 dunam per stadium (~15,000 seats). Citywide public space.
rules.notes: Entry threshold: 150,000 residents. 20 dunam per large stadium. Classified as citywide public space (שב"צ כלל עירוני).

rules.rule_text: 1 athletics stadium per 250,000 residents. 20 dunam per facility. Citywide public space.
rules.notes: Entry threshold: 250,000 residents. 20 dunam per facility. Classified as citywide public space (שב"צ כלל עירוני).

rules.rule_text: 1 court per 4,000 residents. 0.7 dunam per court. Only 50% of demand receives dedicated land allocation.
rules.notes: 1 court per 4,000 residents. 0.7 dunam per court (2.8 dunam for cluster of 4). 50% allocation coefficient — remainder sourced from public open space (שצ"פ). Combined only in community center Model 3.

rules.rule_text: Derived from school classes: 1 hall per 18 elementary classes + 1 hall per 36 secondary classes. No dedicated land. Combined in school/community center/commercial project.
rules.notes: No dedicated land allocation. 550–1,450 m² built per hall (not counted in land quota). Combined in school building, community center, or commercial project. Not classified as public-space allocation.

rules.rule_text: 1 station per 150,000 residents. 4,500 m² built (medium/large station). 3 dunam land. Citywide public space.
rules.notes: Entry threshold: 150,000 (based on existing city conditions). 4,500 m² built for medium/large station. 3 dunam (high building rights allow smaller plot for large station). Citywide שב"צ. Replaces the smaller community policing center in the original rules.json.

rules.rule_text: 2 m² per resident (both existing and new development). Minimum 80% green infrastructure.
rules.notes: 2 m²/resident, applies to both existing and new fabric. Minimum 80% green. Can be partially or fully reduced if citywide open-space balance (10 m²/resident) is met. Existing green infrastructure must be preserved.

rules.rule_text: New development only: 3 m² per resident. Existing fabric: 0 (no citywide open space allocated). 100% green. Up to completion of 10 m²/resident citywide standard.
rules.notes: New development only. 3 m²/resident up to completion of 10 m²/resident citywide target. 100% green infrastructure. Search area: entire municipal boundary (can include land outside city per guidelines).
